---
subtitle: "Darwin Fish Recall Entries"
# filters:
#   - sorting-hat
#   - ripper
# extensions:
#   sorting-hat:
#     keep:
#       - r
#     verbose: true
  # ripper:
  #   include-yaml: false
  #   output-dir: "../pipeline"
  #   output-name: "01_mah_a_load_data"
  #   script-links-position: "none"
format: gfm
---

### Read in Data

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(eval = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| deployment: main

#| sorting-hat: keep
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(targets)

tar_load(
  c(mahery_files),
  store = here("_targets")
)
```

```{r}
fish_enc_g <- mahery_files %>%
  str_subset("fish_enc_17Feb2025") %>%
  read.csv()

hh_fish <- mahery_files %>%
  str_subset("Laoko_Mar_10_2021") %>%
  read.csv()
```

```{r}
#| deployment: main


#| sorting-hat: keep
dar_hh_fish_with_grams_no_weekly <- {
  x <- c(mahery_files, fish_enc_g, hh_fish)
  tibble()
}
```
